div.p: Critical Path: Dispatch and Execution are the primary targets for optimization (Computed Goto / Tail Calls).

ul.li: Bytecode Stream: High spatial locality. Pre-fetcher friendly.
Constant Pool: Low locality. Causes TLB pressure if pool is large.
Operand Stack: Extremely high temporal locality. Usually fits entirely in L1.

div.p: Performance Trap: OP_LOAD_CONST causes a pipeline stall while waiting for the constant pool pointer dereference.
